description_long: This is a pair of round-lensed glasses with a minimalist, full-rim frame. The lenses are perfectly circular and set within thin, dark rims that connect via a simple, slightly arched bridge. The temples are straight and slender, extending back with a gentle downward curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The overall design is understated and classic, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements. The lenses have a dark, uniform tint, providing a sleek and modern appearance. No brand markings or logos are visible on any part of the frame.
description: A pair of round, dark-lensed glasses with a thin, minimalist full-rim frame and straight, unadorned temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the perfectly round lenses, thin full rims, and the simple arched bridge connecting the lenses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, slender temples and the thin profile of the frame and lenses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the round lenses from behind and the attachment points of the temples to the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the straight temples and the minimalistic frame structure.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a classic round geometry with thin, full rims encircling each lens. The structure is minimalist, with straight, slender temples and a simple, slightly arched bridge. There are no decorative elements or embellishments, giving the glasses a clean and timeless look.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses have a uniform dark gray tint, providing a consistent level of shading across the entire surface. They appear opaque and do not display any gradient, mirroring, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, slightly arched bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads or additional support structures. It is integrated seamlessly into the frame.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, thin, and unadorned, with a gentle downward curve at the ends for comfort. There are no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative features.
